modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: eSports anti-cheat software fails to initialize and run

full_description_text: 
So, during the call, the user mentioned that the Vanguard Anti-Cheat just won't start up at all. They also said that Face-It Anti-Cheat isn't running either, which is really frustrating for them. It seems like they were trying to get everything set up in the eSports Lab but hit this snag. They were hoping to get some help to sort it out quickly.
short_description: eSports anti-cheat software fails to initialize and run
